name: ExtensionTransport_StatusReason
title: R5: Reason for current status (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Transport.statusReason` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Transport.statusReason` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `Transport.statusReason` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Transport.statusReason` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.statusReason` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `Transport.statusReason` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.statusReason` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This applies to the current status.  Look at the history of the transport to see reasons for past statuses.

element.definition: An explanation as to why this transport is held, failed, was refused, etc.
element.comment: This applies to the current status.  Look at the history of the transport to see reasons for past statuses.

binding.description: Codes to identify the reason for current status.  These will typically be specific to a particular workflow.
